languages.text: {n}Звук рябит короткими помехами, затем голос магоса Тетрии-Леммы вновь занимает эфир.{/n} "Да будет всеуслышан священный закон Его!"
{n}The sound crackles with brief static, then the voice of Logis Tetria-Lemma occupies the airwaves once more.{/n} "Let His sacred law be heard by all!"
languages.original_text: {n}Звук рябит короткими помехами, затем голос магоса Тетрии-Леммы вновь занимает эфир.{/n} "Да будет всеуслышан священный закон Его!"

traits.locale_text: {n}The sound crackles with brief static, then the voice of Logis Tetria-Lemma occupies the airwaves once more.{/n} "Let His sacred law be heard by all!"
{n}The sound crackles with brief static, then the voice of Logis Tetria-Lemma occupies the airwaves once more.{/n} "Let His sacred Thirteenth Law be heard by all!"
{n}The sound crackles with brief static, then the voice of Logis Tetria-Lemma occupies the airwaves once more.{/n} "Let His sacred Thirteenth Law be heard by all!"
{n}The sound crackles with brief static, then the voice of Logis Tetria-Lemma occupies the airwaves once more.{/n} "Let His sacred law be heard by all!"

languages.text: {n}静電気が一瞬発生し、音声が途切れる。そして再び、ロギス・テトリア・レマの音が波に乗る。{/n}「彼の聖なる第十三の法を、全ての人々に聞かせよ！」
languages.original_text: {n}The sound crackles with brief static, then the voice of Logis Tetria-Lemma occupies the airwaves once more.{/n} "Let His sacred Thirteenth Law be heard by all!"

traits.locale_text: {n}静電気が一瞬発生し、音声が途切れる。そして再び、ロギス・テトリア・レマの音が波に乗る。{n}「彼の聖なる第十三の法を、全ての人々に聞かせよ！」

languages.text: {n}Un chisporroteo de estática interrumpe el sonido, seguido de la voz del logos Tetria-Lemma.{/n} «¡Que su sagrada Ley sea escuchada por todos!».
languages.original_text: {n}The sound crackles with brief static, then the voice of Logis Tetria-Lemma occupies the airwaves once more.{/n} "Let His sacred law be heard by all!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Un chisporroteo de estática interrumpe el sonido, seguido de la voz del logos Tetria-Lemma.{/n} «¡Que su sagrada Ley sea escuchada por todos!».

languages.text: {n}一阵短暂的静电杂音后，逻辑士特特里亚-莱玛的声音再度占据频道。{/n}“让祂那神圣的普适准则响彻众耳！”
languages.original_text: {n}The sound crackles with brief static, then the voice of Logis Tetria-Lemma occupies the airwaves once more.{/n} "Let His sacred law be heard by all!"

traits.locale_text: {n}一阵短暂的静电杂音后，逻辑士特特里亚-莱玛的声音再度占据频道。{/n}“让祂那神圣的普适准则响彻众耳！”

languages.text: {n}Nach einem kurzen Knistern ertönt erneut die Stimme von Logis Tetria-Lemma.{/n} "Lasset alle Sein heiliges Gesetz hören!"
languages.original_text: {n}The sound crackles with brief static, then the voice of Logis Tetria-Lemma occupies the airwaves once more.{/n} "Let His sacred law be heard by all!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Nach einem kurzen Knistern ertönt erneut die Stimme von Logis Tetria-Lemma.{/n} "Lasset alle Sein heiliges Gesetz hören!"

languages.text: {n}Kısa bir cızırtı çatlamasının ardından Logis Tetria-Lemma'nın sesi, hava dalgalarını bir kez daha işgal ediyor.{/n} "O'nun kutsal yasası, herkes tarafından duyulsun!"
languages.original_text: {n}The sound crackles with brief static, then the voice of Logis Tetria-Lemma occupies the airwaves once more.{/n} "Let His sacred law be heard by all!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Kısa bir cızırtı çatlamasının ardından Logis Tetria-Lemma'nın sesi, hava dalgalarını bir kez daha işgal ediyor.{/n} "O'nun kutsal yasası, herkes tarafından duyulsun!"

languages.text: {n}La communication est interrompue par de brefs grésillements, puis la voix du logis Tetria-Lemma occupe à nouveau les ondes :{/n} « Puisse Sa Loi sacrée résonner aux oreilles de tous ! »
languages.original_text: {n}The sound crackles with brief static, then the voice of Logis Tetria-Lemma occupies the airwaves once more.{/n} "Let His sacred law be heard by all!"
